saves) if (v_aura_hardening == 0 && v_b3_ch9_currents == 1 && v_perception < 3 && v_reflexes < 3 || v_b3_ch9_currents == 1 && v_aura_hardening > 0 && v_perception < 3 && v_reflexes < 3
